race.comment: PRINCE PINOT (4) has only won one of 21 starts, is yet to hit the frame first-up and this is well short of his best, but he could not have hoped to find a better race to resume in. Has had two jumpouts in preparation for this and looks set to run his best race yet fresh. FINAL QUARTER (14) is backing up six days after finishing second over 1600m at Swan Hill, has the inside gate and should be in the finish. TARSHIN (12) fought on well for second last start over 1600m at Kilmore, making it two minor placings in a row. Will appreciate the drop in grade and looks sure to be competitive. WINGS OF CARMEN (6) is yet to find the winners' list this time in work but has two placings from four outings this preparation and while this is slightly tougher than recent assignments, at least he's been around the mark. MORAL TURPITUDE (1) was outclassed in a couple of runs immediately after breaking the maiden but was narrowly beaten the start prior in a similar class race to this, so must respect.
